suggestions.title: Counter semantics for player_count_returned can obscure per-run analysis
suggestions.action: Kept counter instrument to satisfy issue requirement and added run_date_utc metric attribute on add() to preserve per-run queryability in App Insights/Log Analytics.

suggestions.title: No staging telemetry verification for App Insights and Log Analytics acceptance criteria
suggestions.action: Not implemented in this repo-only change set because visibility in Metrics Explorer and workspace queryability requires deployed staging resources and runtime execution outside unit-test scope.
